title: Little boxes around dynamic values on PDFs
excerpt: Is there any way to delete the little boxes that show up around the dynamic values on a workdoc? I am trying to make a pdf for a client and the boxes are awkward.

posts.author: mrwhite77 (Randi White)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to delete the little boxes that show up around the dynamic values on a workdoc? I am trying to make a pdf for a client and the boxes are awkward.
